instruction: Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.
input: Reflected cross-site scripting vulnerability in Quiz And Survey Master versions prior to 7.3.7 allows a remote attacker to inject an arbitrary script via unspecified vectors.
output: A reflected cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability exists in Quiz And Survey Master versions before 7.3.7, permitting remote attackers to inject arbitrary scripts through unspecified methods.
